scope: Priority screen of the next 500 pending no-anchor players after batch 017, covering source rows 996-1495. Includes only researched candidates whose shared calibrated projected BBPR clears 60.
method: Start from pending players after source row 995 with current-team values and no completed projection.
Screen the first 500 remaining pending rows, source rows 996 through 1495.
Skip players who do not clear 60 BBPR under the shared calibration after a scored historical anchor is assigned.
For every selected no-anchor row, assign a researched historicalRating from official roster, production, recruiting, and current sentiment context.
Use official team pages first, then reputable stat or team/local coverage when historical production or current role sentiment is needed.
Calculate opportunity, talent, projection score, and projected BBPR with the same calibration formulas used by the admin apply path.
Leave every row pending admin approval so source context can be reviewed before application.

formulas.syntheticHistoricalAnchor: No-imported-anchor players receive a researched historicalRating estimate from production, level, recruiting pedigree, physical tools, health, and role sentiment.
formulas.projectedBbprWithHistory: shared calibrateProjectedBbpr(anchoredPlayer, suggested) logic used by admin apply path

screeningSummary.excludedReason: Remaining screened rows either lacked enough sourced role/production signal, were crowded low-minute freshmen/internationals, had health/redshirt concerns, or calibrated at 60 BBPR or below.

players.researchSummary: Kanye Clary receives a 60 anchor from prior Penn State scoring volume, Mississippi State SEC experience, and Oklahoma State transfer-role context. His role score assumes a substantial Cowboy guard opportunity while keeping the final number below the top-100 line until the Oklahoma State usage split is confirmed.

teamContext.starterEvidence: Oklahoma State context and sourced roster/production evidence support a yes starter label for this screening pass.
teamContext.scoredAnchor: Synthetic historical anchor: 60. This is used only because the projection export had no historical BBPR for the row.
teamContext.roleCap: Selected because the same shared calibration projects above 60 BBPR; screened rows at 60 or below were intentionally left out.
teamContext.positionCompetition: Oklahoma State's G minutes should be reviewed against returning contributors, portal additions, freshmen, and health before applying the suggestion.

evidence.notes: Official roster/transfer context verifies Clary's Oklahoma State status after Penn State and Mississippi State.
Historical stat page documents Clary's prior college production profile.
Source row 1006 has no imported historical BBPR, so this batch assigns a scored anchor of 60 before projection.
